message:
Grant default capabilities to all agents regardless of auth method

Agents registered via HTTP without a Bearer token were not getting
default capabilities (send_message, fetch_inbox, file_reservation_paths,
acknowledge_message). Now all agents — whether connecting via stdio,
HTTP with Bearer token, or HTTP without token — receive the same
default capabilities on registration.

- Add DEFAULT_AGENT_CAPABILITIES constant
- Include capabilities in AgentResponse for register_agent, create_agent_identity, whois
- Fix tooling_capabilities resource to return defaults instead of empty vec
- Add #[serde(default)] for backward-compatible deserialization

Closes #5

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1407,7 +1407,10 @@ pub fn tooling_capabilities(_ctx: &McpContext, agent: String) -> McpResult<Strin
     let snapshot = ToolingCapabilitiesSnapshot {
         agent: agent_name,
         project: query.get("project").cloned().unwrap_or_default(),
-        capabilities: vec![],
+        capabilities: crate::identity::DEFAULT_AGENT_CAPABILITIES
+            .iter()
+            .map(|s| (*s).to_string())
+            .collect(),
         generated_at: None,
     };
